title: Xtra Flaky Mexican Tortilla Quesadilla
description: A fatty and flaky weeknight Mexican dish featuring butter and wok-hei, this Jain-friendly recipe is perfect for a quick dinner
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium heat and add 2 tablespoons of melted butter to the pan
Add the diced onion to the pan and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize
Add the diced bell pepper to the pan and cook until it is tender
Add the diced tomato to the pan and cook until it is tender
In a large bowl, combine the shredded cheese, chopped cilantro, lime juice, salt, and pepper
Place a large tortilla in the pan and sprinkle a quarter of the cheese mixture onto half of the tortilla
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the cheese mixture and cook until the tortilla is crispy and the cheese is melted
Flip the quesadilla and cook until the other side is crispy and the cheese is melted
Repeat the process with the remaining tortillas and cheese mixture
Cut the quesadillas into wedges and serve hot
